pages.text: The spell summons a $(l:summons/ministrosities)Stone Ministrosity$(), a simple golem that can move quickly to bite down your foes.
Casting with $(l:crafts/staff/geo_staff)Geo Staff$() will summon additional Ministrosities. Casting while wearing $(l:crafts/garment/geo_robe)Geo Robes$() will summon Redstone Ministrosities instead.
